systems.name: Music Lab
systems.description: Free interactive instruments in the browser — piano, drums, DJ pads, singing bowls. No installs, no signup. The fastest way to start making sound.

systems.name: Vibe OS
systems.description: Research-backed state-change music engine. A state library mapping BPM, key, mode, and instrumentation to target states, a Suno prompt generator, and an MCP server so agents can use it too.

systems.name: Music Intelligence Hub
systems.description: The registry that holds the system together — schemas, portable agent exports, research notes, and the open questions still being worked through in public.

systems.name: AI Music Academy
systems.description: Structured education for AI-era music creation — from first prompt to a finished, released track. Built for self-paced learners and classrooms alike.

systems.name: Awesome Music Agent Skills
systems.description: 150+ curated tools, APIs, and MCP servers for music agents — generation, analysis, mixing, metadata, distribution. The map of what exists.

systems.name: Suno Skills
systems.description: Suno prompting skills for Claude — genre patterns, style stacking, and production checklists, distilled from years of daily production work.

audiences.name: Producers
audiences.description: Prompt engineering for Suno with genre patterns and production checklists — plus the parameter research behind why a prompt works.

audiences.name: Record Labels
audiences.description: Schemas and portable agent exports for catalog metadata, A&R workflows, and AI tooling that plugs into your existing stack.

audiences.name: Film & Sync
audiences.description: State-to-parameter mapping turns a brief like "tense but hopeful" into concrete tempo, mode, and instrumentation choices. Browse the catalog for reference.

audiences.name: Orchestras & Arrangers
audiences.description: The research on how tempo, mode, and timbre shape what an audience feels — useful whether the ensemble is human, AI, or both.

audiences.name: Content Creators
audiences.description: Copy-paste Suno templates for focus, energy, and calm — soundtrack your videos and streams without a music budget.

audiences.name: Educators & Students
audiences.description: Browser instruments that need zero setup, plus a structured curriculum for teaching AI-era music creation.
